TestCase z45Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    double* follow_case_theWeights = (double*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(double));
    memcpy(follow_case_theWeights, t1.theWeights, t1.n * sizeof(double));
    follow_case.theWeights = follow_case_theWeights;
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive code: ensure there is at least one weight
    if (follow_case.n <= 0) {
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Compute sum of weights
    double sum = 0.0;
    for (int i = 0; i < follow_case.n; ++i) {
        sum += follow_case.theWeights[i];
    }
    
    // Avoid division by zero
    if (sum != 0.0) {
        for (int i = 0; i < follow_case.n; ++i) {
            follow_case.theWeights[i] /= sum;
        }
    }
    
    return follow_case;
}
